 {"id":"bd-16dr","title":"Add JFP client to flywheel-clients","description":"Goal:
- Add JFP client wrapper (prompt catalog) to flywheel-clients.

Scope:
- Support status/list/search commands where available.
- Provide JSON parsing + error mapping via shared runner.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit: bd-3gja + bd-9v6g.
- E2E: bd-mipc (stub harness).
- Schema drift: bd-20sm.

Definition of Done:
- JFP client usable by gateway services for prompt discovery.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:21.453865840Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:30:48.747923707Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["clients","jfp"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-16dr","depends_on_id":"bd-1d1j","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:41.059632324Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-16dr","depends_on_id":"bd-2p50","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:21.669474087Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-16dr","depends_on_id":"bd-pfkx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:37.775270036Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-2k5b","title":"Inventory ACFS manifest schema + map to gateway tool registry","description":"Background:
- ACFS manifest schema includes install, verify, dependencies, and security checksums.

Goal:
- Document the mapping from ACFS manifest fields to Gateway ToolInfo/Detection fields.

Scope:
- Identify required vs optional tools, categories, tags, and install commands.
- Decide which fields are safe to surface in public API.

Definition of Done:
- A concise design note (in comments or doc) describing field mapping and any omissions.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:37.236922636Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:55:29.806345842Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T06:55:29.806263667Z","close_reason":"Completed: documented ACFS manifest mapping in setup + detection services","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","design","integration","registry"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2k5b","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:37.266237686Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
